caption:
Meet me in the breakroom? The professor's lounge was my secret sanctuary. 🥥

Last semester, I felt the heat when the new student approached my office hours. His eyes lingered on my cleavage under the blazer, and I knew his gaze was a game. By the third week, he'd slipped a note into my grading stack: 'Office 3B, 8 PM, the smartest girl in the room.' 

That night, I adjusted my oversized cardigan, feeling the silk slip against my skin. My breasts, hidden beneath the tailored navy blazer, strained against the fabric as I climbed the stairs. The air in the corridor hummed with electricity. At 8 PM, I found him. He wasn't reading a book; he was watching my every move. 

We slipped into the shadows of the library, the smell of old paper mixing with the scent of my perfume. His hands touched my waist, my back, my thighs, as we leaned against the wooden shelves. Every whisper was a secret, every touch a promise. The world outside faded into the background, leaving only the thrill of a forbidden connection, a spark between a teacher and a student. My blazer felt tighter, my heart racing as he pulled my cardigan to the side, revealing the curve of my shoulder and the promise of what came next. 

It was a dance of control and surrender, a secret that would define us. We ended up on a plush velvet chair, his lips brushing my neck, and I knew the semester's work was only just beginning. 

#ProfessorLife #OfficeHours #ForbiddenLove #UniversitySecrets #Curves #SexyTeacher #BreaktimeAdventure #SilkAndBlazer #StudySession #Euphoria
